blocks.text: Carlsen opens his World Chess Championship challenger campaign today
♟️ 16:00 — FIDE Candidates R1: Magnus Carlsen launches his World Championship challenger bid
🚴 11:55 — Dwars door Vlaanderen: Wærenskjold the lone Norwegian in today's Belgian spring classic
Barcelona lead Real Madrid by 4 points. Saturday's clash at the Metropolitano is the title-decider La Liga has been building toward all season.
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest: rain (Håvard Nygaard) leads Norway at the year's biggest CS2 event
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich, Champions League quarterfinal at the Bernabéu
